description: Creates an implication annotation that shows a step leading to a conclusion. References a step annotation and displays a conclusion text with optional styling.
utility: Mark logical implications or conclusions following from a step

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position of the implication arrow, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: stepRef
arguments.description: Reference to an annotationstep variable (e.g., astep_1)

arguments.name: conclusion
arguments.description: Conclusion text displayed as the result of the step

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

examples.expression: astep_1 = annotationstep(at(1,1), size(3), "1"), stepimplies(at(3,1), astep_1, "therefore", c(blue))
